texto: You can’t always eat perfectly clean. You can’t always control the quality of your food sources. You can’t always resist temptation—and who'd want to?! And you certainly can’t diet forever—we’ve tried and failed... But YOU CAN control the emotional quality and pleasure content you bring to every meal. You are what and HOW you eat. Change your brain and you will change your diet, body & whole life!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Melissa Milne que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “You can’t always eat perfectly clean. You can’t always control the quality of your food sources. …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, healthy-living, always, com foco em mudanca e dia-chuvoso.
